ab: 2022 cenana, makarikari sehu Yencumin tamna nipinsiu tʉni arisinatʉn Cau Vuvurung tamna nganai.
ch: 在2022年，政府召開了原住民身分證可單列族名的會議。
en: In 2022, the government announced that indigenous identification cards can include tribal names separately.

ab: kesoniʉn maku miaranau cu makinee na sehu, nipinsiu tia marisinatʉ “caukia nganai” sua nanmarua puraku Pa’ʉ.
ch: 我訪問了長期向政府爭取身分證「單列族名」的部落青年Pa’ʉ。
en: I interviewed Pa’ʉ, a young tribal member who has long been advocating for the inclusion of tribal names on identification cards.

ab: ’arupatuturu kim na tarasangara isi, tia mukusa tanasa in kesoni ’inia.
ch: 我和他約定好這個假日到他家訪問他。
en: We had arranged to visit his home this holiday for the interview.

ab: miaa kesoni ’inia, siukai nguain niaranai nanu sua nganai in. marivici pa ’ikua tarakanangʉ cau tanasa in, mataa nguain tamna puraku.
ch: 在訪問的過程中，他向我介紹了他的名字的由來，也帶我認識了他的家人、他的部落。
en: During the interview, he introduced to me the origin of his name and also introduced me to his family and tribe.

ab: kesoniʉn maku, miseni manatʉrʉ cʉpʉngʉ tia mati’ʉnʉ’ʉna nganai, cʉngnan niarisinatʉa ’esi nanu aka?
ch: 我問他為什麼堅持要改名，舊的登記方式不好嗎?
en: I asked him why he insisted on changing his name. Wasn’t the old registration method sufficient?

ab: makasi ’ikua, ’urupaca Nakasayana ka’anʉ tʉni munasʉ sumasʉpʉrʉ nganai in. ’una pa cau marisusuna ’inia “巴先生” misee. ’itumuru makasua pacacaʉn.
ch: 他對我說，因為用中文字並不能準確的傳達他的名字，其他人還會叫他「巴先生」，也因此鬧出不少笑話。
en: He told me that using Chinese characters could not accurately convey his name, and others would still call him \"Ba Xian Sheng,\" which resulted in many jokes being made.

ab: makasi Pa’ʉ: “’urupaca Yencumin kari nganai ia, cucuru nganai mita. nganai maku ’esi ’inia cuku mita, cʉpʉngana mita, tina’an nganara mita, kamʉcʉ arakacaua cuakia tʉni mʉtʉa takacicini tamna nganai.”
ch: Pa’ʉ說：「原住民語書寫的名字才是我們真正的名字。我的名字代表了我們的族群、我們的家族、我們的身分，希望能有更多族人找回自己的名字。」
en: Noami Kulas said, “The names written in indigenous languages are our true names. My name represents our ethnic group, our family, our identity. I hope more fellow tribespeople can reclaim their own names.”
